```json
{"schema":"irin.directive.proposal.v1","authority":"recommend","verdict":"Act","in_response_to":"esc-0006","rationale":"Checker concluded the 5x cost deviation meets threshold for recommend-only dispatch of a Worker to investigate session cost drivers with stop condition on variance reduction. Analyst confirmed narrow Worker recommendation for cost attribution with 100% convergence on the concrete session_cost_5x metric.","job":"investigate council session cost drivers","scope":{"tenant":"globex","subject":"session_cost_5x","allowed_actions":["read","report","review"]},"stop_condition":"stop when cost returns \u2264 2\u00d7 baseline for 2 consecutive intervals or a remediation plan is approved","return_expectation":"report top cost drivers and recommended remediation options"}
```
